nature_language:
We are 3 people traveling from Suzhou to Beijing for 3 days, and we need to meet at least one of the following requirements:
1. We want to try these restaurants: Beijing Guomao CBD Atour S Hotel xFunsCenter · Jichuan (Dawanglu Branch) and Da Dong (Muxiyuan Bridge Branch)
2. We want to stay in a twin room
